name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M41113 [Premium Enhanced Version]. Genuine Italian A-grade diamond quilted leather from the official factory. Counter-synced chip. Focuses on quality, full steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, and A-grade high-quality output. Fully upgraded again. Photos match the product. Full packaging included. Dimensions: 25*19*15CM
